message:
Improve beads with user feedback, synergies, and edge cases

Enhancements:
- bd-389n: Added show_degradation_indicator option for visual feedback
           Added on_degradation callback for telemetry/monitoring
           Added development() preset config

- bd-em01: Added synergy notes (Time-Travel, Budget, Introspection)
- bd-2lwf: Added synergy notes (Tracing, Session Recording, Headless)
- bd-17nn: Added synergy notes (Layout Debugger, Tracing, Error Boundaries)
- bd-3tiz: Added synergy notes (Frame Caching, Budget, Tracing)

- bd-c6x0: Added edge case tests:
           - empty_macro_handles_gracefully
           - very_long_macro_scales
           - unicode_event_content_preserved
           - rapid_fire_events_captured
           - corrupted_file_detected
           - version_mismatch_handled
           - resize_during_playback_handled

These changes improve:
1. User experience with optional degradation indicator
2. Documentation of feature synergies for holistic understanding
3. Test coverage of edge cases for robustness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
